message:
Command `# Good - the pnr_v4.log has NOT grown since GRT finished (still 250758 lines).
# The process is now running step 32 (second GRT instance) but it's buffering output.
# OpenROAD-based output goes to flow.log, which IS growing.
# Let's check if new GRT output appeared in flow.log since our last grep
wc -l /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/flow.log 2>/dev/null
grep -c "NesterovSolve\|GRT-001" /workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/pnr_run_v4/flow.log 2>/dev/null` executed with exit code -1.
